title: Car show a huge success
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"STEYTLERVILLE NEWS - Haronique Jafta, who turned 33 on 26 April, has always had great dreams to bring car shows to Steytlerville.","html":"STEYTLERVILLE NEWS - Haronique Jafta, who turned 33 on 26 April, has always had great dreams to bring car shows to Steytlerville."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This dream recently came true when the Karoo Stance Car Show was hosted at the Steytlerville Sport Grounds, and was a great success."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jafta, going under the brand name Cheeseboy.com, was behind it all.","html":"Jafta, going under the brand name Cheeseboy.com, was behind it all."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lifelong dream","html":"Lifelong dream"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said that, growing up in Steytlerville, he always loved and dreamed of beautiful cars, but knew that it would take hard work to earn one himself.","html":"He said that, growing up in Steytlerville, he always loved and dreamed of beautiful cars, but knew that it would take hard work to earn one himself."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As a teenager he played rugby for the Steytlerville Barbarians Football Club, and occasionally had to find work to sustain himself.","html":"As a teenager he played rugby for the Steytlerville Barbarians Football Club, and occasionally had to find work to sustain himself."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On 2 January 2016, he was involved in an accident on his way back from a job hunt in nearby Montagu.","html":"On 2 January 2016, he was involved in an accident on his way back from a job hunt in nearby Montagu."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He lost his left leg just above his knee.","html":"He lost his left leg just above his knee."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the years since, his health has been up and down and he was in and out of hospital, but he never lost his love for beautiful-old school cars.","html":"In the years since, his health has been up and down and he was in and out of hospital, but he never lost his love for beautiful-old school cars."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His own cars","html":"His own cars"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He bought his first car, a Chevrolet 1.8 Trailblazer, and later a Toyota 1.6 GL.","html":"He bought his first car, a Chevrolet 1.8 Trailblazer, and later a Toyota 1.6 GL."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He had his cars fine-tuned and upgraded and started to enter car competitions and shows.","html":"He had his cars fine-tuned and upgraded and started to enter car competitions and shows."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His dream took off when entered a car competition in Jansenville in October 2024 and one in Aberdeen in November, where he won first prize in the old-school category.","html":"His dream took off when entered a car competition in Jansenville in October 2024 and one in Aberdeen in November, where he won first prize in the old-school category."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This strengthened his determination to host the show in Steytlerville.","html":"This strengthened his determination to host the show in Steytlerville."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Great expectations","html":"Great expectations"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It was the first time that a car show was held in Steytlerville, with cars coming from Graaff-Reinet, Steytlerville, Jansenville, Willowmore, Kariega and Carnarvon to compete in the categories Best Static, Best Wheel, Best Crew, Best Old School and Best Show.","html":"It was the first time that a car show was held in Steytlerville, with cars coming from Graaff-Reinet, Steytlerville, Jansenville, Willowmore, Kariega and Carnarvon to compete in the categories Best Static, Best Wheel, Best Crew, Best Old School and Best Show."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thanks go to the Royal Hotel, that made it possible for the competition to take place.","html":"Thanks go to the Royal Hotel, that made it possible for the competition to take place."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While only 10 cars took part in this first show, expectations are that there will be enough support from sponsors and the community to make it an annual event.","html":"While only 10 cars took part in this first show, expectations are that there will be enough support from sponsors and the community to make it an annual event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
